title: Dual-Side Potato Fries Maker — Heated Oil Basin with Auto-Flip Basket
design_question: How to automatically cook potato fries on both sides with consistent golden browning?
selected_approach: 2 L cooking oil basin with 2 kW immersion heating element. K-type thermocouple + MAX6675 ADC feeds temperature to Arduino PID controller (setpoint 175°C). Stainless mesh basket held in servo-actuated pivoting arm (SG5010, 4.1 kg·cm). At t=3 min, servo inverts basket 180° (flip). Drain timer t=1 min post-cook. Buzzer alarm on cycle completion. SSR controls 230 V heater element. Safety: thermal fuse 230°C NC in series with heater.
rationale: PID temperature control prevents over/undercooking. Auto-flip eliminates manual intervention for even browning. SSR provides silent zero-crossing AC switching. Thermal fuse provides hardware-level overheat protection independent of microcontroller.

alternatives.reason_rejected: Longer cooking time for thick fries.

verification_notes: FACT: 'Deep-Fry Immersion Heating — Oil Temperature Control' confirms dual-fry cycle timing and 2 kW heater recovery time.
supporting_fact_titles: Deep-Fry Immersion Heating — Oil Temperature Control
